additional_capabilities.description: Enables hibernation or ultra SSD for the VM

admin_ssh_key.description: Provides SSH key for admin access

allow_extension_operations.description: Enables extension operations on the VM

availability_set_id.description: Specifies the ID of the availability set

boot_diagnostics.description: Configures boot diagnostics with storage URI

bypass_platform_safety_checks_on_user_sc.description: Allows bypassing safety checks on user schedule

capacity_reservation_group_id.description: ID of the capacity reservation group

computer_name.description: Sets the computer name for the VM

dedicated_host_group_id.description: ID of the dedicated host group for the VM

dedicated_host_id.description: ID of the dedicated host for the VM

disk_controller_type.description: Specifies the type of disk controller

edge_zone.description: Specifies the edge zone for VM deployment

eviction_policy.description: Defines the eviction policy for spot VMs

extensions_time_budget.description: Sets time budget for VM extensions

gallery_application.type: list(object({automatic_upgrade_enabled: optional(bool),configuration_blob_uri: optional(string),order: optional(number),tag: optional(string),treat_failure_as_deployment_failure_enabled: optional(bool),version_id: string}))

identity.description: Manages VM identities and principal IDs

license_type.description: Specifies the license type for the VM

max_bid_price.description: Maximum bid price for spot instances

name.description: Specifies the unique identifier for the VM

network_interface_ids.description: Lists the network interfaces for the VM

os_disk.description: Configures OS disk properties and settings
os_disk.type: list(object({caching: string,disk_encryption_set_id: optional(string),disk_size_gb: optional(number),name: optional(string),secure_vm_disk_encryption_set_id: optional(string),security_encryption_type: optional(string),storage_account_type: string,write_accelerator_enabled: optional(bool),diff_disk_settings: list(object({option: string,placement: optional(string)}))}))

patch_assessment_mode.description: Defines the mode for patch assessment

plan.description: Details the purchase plan for the VM

platform_fault_domain.description: Specifies the fault domain for the VM

priority.description: Sets the priority level of the VM

provision_vm_agent.description: Enables provisioning of the VM agent

proximity_placement_group_id.description: ID of the proximity placement group

reboot_setting.description: Configures reboot settings for the VM

secret.description: Manages secrets in Key Vault for the VM

secure_boot_enabled.description: Enables secure boot for the VM

source_image_id.description: ID of the source image for the VM

timeouts.description: Sets custom timeouts for VM operations

user_data.description: Provides user data for VM initialization

virtual_machine_scale_set_id.description: ID of the VM scale set

vm_agent_platform_updates_enabled.description: Enables platform updates for VM agent

zone.description: Specifies the availability zone for the VM

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.

location.description: Location that this resource will be created in. (e.g. eastus2, southeastasia)
